use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and newsletters
Secondary action buttons with outline styling
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning actions
Ghost-style buttons for subtle navigation elements
Icon buttons for compact UI actions
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe prop handling and Radix UI Slot for asChild composition. Designed as a reusable atomic component commonly used in newsletter subscription cards, marketing pages, and form interfaces.
